zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville是William de Glanville的女兒，於1178年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她於1195年與Theobald de Valoignes在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1210年在英國素福爾可紐馬可特享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville是William de Glanville的女儿，于1178年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。她于1195年与Theobald de Valoignes在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1210年在英国素福爾可紐馬可特享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville was born in 1178, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William de Glanville. She married Theobald de Valoignes in 1195, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1210, in Newmarket, Suffolk, England, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville est née en 1178, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William de Glanville. Elle a épousé Theobald de Valoignes en 1195, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1210, à Newmarket, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville wurde 1178 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William de Glanville geboren. Sie hat 1195 in England Theobald de Valoignes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1210 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Newmarket, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville è nata il nel 1178 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William de Glanville. Lei sposato Theobald de Valoignes nel 1195, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1210, nel Newmarket, Suffolk, England, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanvilleは1178年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでWilliam de Glanvilleの娘として生まれた。1195年にイギリスでTheobald de Valoignesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1210年にイギリススフォルクニューマーケトで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville(은)는 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 William de Glanville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1195년 영국에서 Theobald de Valoignes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 영국 수폴크 뉴마크트에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville nasceu em 1178, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William de Glanville. Ela casou-se com Theobald de Valoignes em 1195, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1210, em Newmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville родилась в 1178 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали William de Glanville. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald de Valoignes в 1195 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1210 г. в местности нюмаркет, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Glanville nació en 1178, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de William de Glanville. Se casó con Theobald de Valoignes en 1195, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1210, en Newmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años.
